metadata.description: Official Steadwing agent skills — AI Root Cause Analysis for production incidents

plugins.name: steadwing
plugins.description: Use when the user asks to run Root Cause Analysis (RCA), debug a production incident, analyze an error log or stack trace, or trigger Steadwing. Self-registers a Steadwing agent, triggers RCA via the Steadwing API, and can install a hook that detects production-style errors and offers RCA.
